ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "car_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car type */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the car */,
  "med_price" REAL /* Median price of the car */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the car */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "is_manual_transmission" INTEGER /* Whether a manual transmission is available */,
  "is_four_wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Whether the vehicle is four-wheel drive */,
  "is_all_wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Whether the vehicle is all-wheel drive */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in the city (MPG) */,
  "open_road_mpg" REAL /* Fuel efficiency on open road (MPG) */,
  "airbag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airbag type */,
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drive train type */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine specification */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dimension record */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "passenger_capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity */,
  "luggage_capacity" REAL /* Luggage capacity in cubic meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in kilograms */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the car (USA or Foreign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_airbag_id FOREIGN KEY ("airbag_id") REFERENCES airbags ("airbag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engine_specifications ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES dimensions ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_car_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_type_id") REFERENCES car_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drive_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_train_id") REFERENCES drive_trains ("drive_train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car type (e.g., Small, Midsize, Compact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the car type image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airbags" (
  "airbag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airbag type */,
  "airbag_type" TEXT /* Name of the airbag type (e.g., Driver, DriverPassenger) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the airbag type */,
  "number_of_airbags" INTEGER /* Number of airbags present */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airbag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_trains" (
  "drive_train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive train type */,
  "drive_train_type" TEXT /* Name of the drive train configuration (e.g., FrontWheelDr, RearWheelDr) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive train type */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the drive train in Nm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency record */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in the city (MPG) */,
  "open_road_mpg" REAL /* Fuel efficiency on open road (MPG) */,
  "combined_mpg" REAL /* Combined fuel efficiency (MPG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension record */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vehicle in centimeters */,
  "wheelbase" REAL /* Wheelbase of the vehicle in centimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the vehicle in centimeters */,
  "u_turn_space" REAL /* U-turn space required in meters */,
  "ground_clearance" REAL /* Ground clearance of the vehicle in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, dealership staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_videos_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
